meta.feed_title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

items.title: World faces food ‘catastrophe’ if Strait of Hormuz disruption persists: FAO
items.summary: Global agriculture is highly exposed to the blockage of waterways, risking higher commodity prices and food inflation.

items.title: Carlos Queiroz named Ghana head coach before World Cup
items.summary: The Portuguese coach takes charge after the sacking of Otto Addo, and will lead the Black Stars at the FIFA World Cup.

items.title: Palestine weekly wrap: ‘Master of the house’ says Ben-Gvir as Al-Aqsa opens
items.summary: Nine-year-old Ritaj Rihan among multiple Palestinians killed in ongoing Gaza attacks amid fears of escalating violence.

items.title: Yamal seeks inspiration from LeBron, Neymar for Champions League comeback
items.summary: Barcelona star Lamine Yamal sees Neymar as his idol and wants to watch him play in the World Cup for Brazil.

items.title: Iran war: What is happening on day 46 of the US-Iran conflict?
items.summary: The US started a blockade on Iranian ports, but Trump said there is still a chance for Tehran to reach a deal.

items.title: China dismisses Vice Minister of Foreign Affairs Sun Weidong
items.summary: Vice Foreign Minister Sun Weidong's sudden dismissal comes amid a wave of removals amid anticorruption campaign.

items.title: The Sea of Azov: Ukraine’s loss but hardly Russia’s gain
items.summary: The colossal steel plants along Ukraine's side of the sea are unrestorable ruins since Russia's invasion.

items.title: New trial over football great Maradona’s death begins in Argentina
items.summary: The trial will, once again, seek to determine if Maradona's medical team was responsible for his death in November 2020.

items.title: Asia’s stock markets surge, oil falls on hopes for US-Iran talks
items.summary: Relief for global markets comes after Trump says Iranian officials are keen on a deal.

items.title: Indonesia, US sign ‘major’ defence cooperation agreement
items.summary: Signing of defence partnership follows reports that US is seeking overflight access in Indonesia for military planes.

items.title: Three babies born into Sudan war every minute, charity warns
items.summary: Sudanese children are being born into conditions 'no child should ever face', Save the Children says.

items.title: Man charged with attempted murder of OpenAI CEO Sam Altman
items.summary: A man has been charged with attempted murder for hurling a Molotov cocktail at the home of OpenAI CEO Sam Altman.

items.title: Super Typhoon Sinlaku bears down on Northern Mariana Islands, Guam
items.summary: Slow-moving Sinlaku is weakening as it heads towards Guam, but it will still bring dangerous conditions to the region.

items.title: US military kills two men in new strike on vessel in eastern Pacific
items.summary: Latest attack brings death toll from US strikes on vessels in the Pacific and Caribbean to at least 170 since September.

items.title: Man charged with attempted murder after attack on OpenAI CEO Altman’s home
items.summary: A 20-year-old Texan faces potential life imprisonment after arson attack on Sam Altman's San Francisco residence.

items.title: Anti-war protesters arrested in New York urging end to Israel weapon sales
items.summary: Police in New York arrested around 100 anti-war protesters during a sit-in demanding an end to US arms for Israel.

items.title: Iran war live: Trump says Tehran wants deal amid US blockade in Hormuz
items.summary: Iran accuses US of committing piracy as thousands rally in Tehran against the blockade in the Strait of Hormuz.

items.title: Hezbollah leader urges Lebanon’s government to pull out of Israel talks
items.summary: Naim Qassem says planned talks in Washington, DC, are a ploy to pressure Hezbollah into laying down its weapons.

items.title: UN urges ‘all parties’ to respect navigation in Strait of Hormuz
items.summary: UN Secretary-General is calling on ‘all parties’ to respect freedom of navigation in the Strait of Hormuz.

items.title: Energy prices rise despite Jones Act suspension by Trump
items.summary: Shipping costs have increased by more than 10 percent in the past month due to the US-Israel war on Iran.

items.title: UN experts slam attacks on Gaza shelters, forced displacement in West Bank
items.summary: Panel details incidents of violence by Israeli forces and settlers against displaced Palestinians in Gaza and West Bank.

items.title: New White House report has plans to fix US housing shortage of 10 million
items.summary: A new report lays out a blueprint for how more home construction would help the middle class and the overall economy.

items.title: What’s behind Viktor Orban’s defeat in Hungary’s election?
items.summary: Hungary's opposition has defeated the prime minister by a landslide.

items.title: French cement giant Lafarge guilty of financing ISIL in Syria
items.summary: Cement company Lafarge and eight of its ex-employees were found guilty of financing ISIL in a French court.

items.title: Benin’s Wadagni wins presidential election with landslide 94% of votes
items.summary: The incoming president faces serious security issues in the north of the country and challenges to living standards.
